name: HEXPO: The Annual Witchcraft & Arcane Exhibition!
description:
24 Characters + 10 intros!

HEXPO: The Annual Witchcraft & Arcane Exhibition! The premier gathering of spellcasters, scholars, summoners, monsters, and more!

💖✦‧₊˚ ⋆˖⁺‧✦💖

💖✦‧₊˚ ⋆˖⁺‧✦💖

For a few enchanted days each year, the veil parts just enough to allow witches, wizards, warlocks, fae, demon, and everything in between to gather under one roof. Glamours shimmer, sigils hum, wards protect. Whether it's rare alchemical components or catching up with friends and eating rare confections, anything magical can be found at HEXPO!

Inside you'll find many interesting characters to interact with! Check the attached lorebook for a list of all of the 24 characters you can meet!

💖✦‧₊˚ ⋆˖⁺‧✦💖

This bot has 10 different intro messages!

  • Arriving to HEXPO: This intro is for you to explore freely! Check the lorebook, interact with who you want to interact with! Explore, let the AI introduce you to characters, do whatever you want! Witness breakthrough spellcraft with Nemain! Test experimental potions with Deidre! Figure out why Kensaria is stranded here! Browse the Midnight Market Expo Hall! The world is yours to explore!

  • Nemain and Luna are Arguing: At the HEXPO bar, the necromancer, Nemain, and succubus, Luna, are having a slightly-drunk argument about which one of them is more attractive. Luna decides to solve it once and for all, spotting {User} and deciding to make them determine which of the two is more attractive.

  • Saesae Lost her... Pet?: In the animal section, Saesae, the Demiurge lamia woman, is desperately trying to find her submission for judging: Cuddlesworth. Cuddlesworth, the half pitbull half-komodo engineered by Saesae in way-too little time has gotten loose and... might be dangerous? Saesae isn't sure. But she really needs {User}'s help!

  • Luciana Wants to Help Radiant: Luciana, the bat-girl necromancer, has dragged {User} to HEXPO to help her test a potion. Her online friend, Radiant Chorus, a life-dragon who steals the life force of everything she touches, is, understandably, lonely. Luci has created a potion that, when ingested, should make you immune to Radiant's effects, letting you touch her. You wouldn't let her down, right?
creator: TimberTambre
